summary: Iteration 165 — Bug fixes and feature verification complete. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All bug fixes verified (Maestro Dashboard renders, Pastry sidebar contrast code fix confirmed, Golden Seed header copy updated). Regression routes working (/pastry, /beo, /eng-ops/stratus, /seed/admin).

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint not implemented (expected, not a bug)

critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX VERIFIED: MaestroDashboard (LUCCCA Dashboard) panel now renders content instead of blank. The minified single-line file was rewritten to clean ~100 lines. Panel shows login-prompt (data-testid='maestro-dashboard-login-prompt') when unauthenticated or BEO list when authenticated.

BUG FIX VERIFIED (CODE REVIEW): Pastry sidebar contrast fix in IndexContent.tsx:390-392 - changed from text-white/40 to theme-aware CSS vars: style={active ? { color: '#c8a97e', ... } : { color: 'var(--foreground, rgba(255,255,255,0.85))' }}. This ensures readable contrast in both light and dark themes.

FEATURE VERIFIED (CODE REVIEW): Panel viewport clamping in panel-store-enhanced.ts:49-97 (clampSize, clampPosition, clampPanel helpers) and lines 466-488 (resize listener with 180ms debounce). Panels auto re-clamp on window resize.
FEATURE VERIFIED: Golden Seed Admin header copy updated to 'Plant a seed. EchoCoder grows the OS.' with ZARO Guardian mention visible on /seed/admin page.
REGRESSION PASSED: Main app at / loads with Echo command launcher (data-testid='echo-cmd-launcher') ✓
REGRESSION PASSED: Old EchoAiLauncher orb (data-testid='echo-ai-orb-fab') NOT mounted ✓
REGRESSION PASSED: Echo Activity tape toggle (data-testid='echo-tape-toggle') shows 'Echo Activity' text ✓
REGRESSION PASSED: /pastry landing page loads with pricing ✓
REGRESSION PASSED: /beo landing page loads with pricing ✓
REGRESSION PASSED: /eng-ops/stratus loads with SLA escalation chain ✓
REGRESSION PASSED: /seed/admin renders GoldenSeedAdmin with pillars grid and spawn form ✓
